mapper.sql: rule_id, rule_code, rule_name, prefix, date_format, seq_length, seq_start, description, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_biz_no_rule WHERE rule_code = #{ruleCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM jst_biz_no_rule
AND rule_code LIKE concat('%', #{ruleCode}, '%')
AND rule_name LIKE concat('%', #{ruleName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY rule_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_biz_no_rule SET rule_code = #{ruleCode}, rule_name = #{ruleName}, prefix = #{prefix}, date_format = #{dateFormat}, seq_length = #{seqLength}, seq_start = #{seqStart}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId}
